path.title: Path
path.description: Absolute filesystem path to a bundled template, e.g. '/opt/agent-queue/src/prompts/consolidation_task.md'. In playbook authoring, use aq://prompts/<name>.md instead — the playbook compiler rewrites it to an absolute path. Mutually exclusive with (project_id, name).

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Key-value pairs for template variables (e.g. {"task_title": "Fix login bug"})

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Feedback explaining what went wrong or what needs to be fixed (appended to task description and stored as a task context entry)

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why the restart is being requested

wait_for_tasks.title: Wait For Tasks
wait_for_tasks.description: If true, pause orchestrator and wait for running tasks to complete before restarting (up to 5 minutes). Default: false.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: The playbook run ID to resume

human_input.title: Human Input
human_input.description: Your review decision or feedback text. This is added to the conversation history and used to determine the next transition.

working_dir.title: Working Dir
working_dir.description: Working directory (absolute path or project ID)

playbook_id.title: Playbook Id
playbook_id.description: The compiled playbook ID to execute

event.title: Event
event.description: Trigger event data to seed the run. Defaults to {"type": "manual"} if not provided. Include fields your playbook expects (e.g. project_id, task_id) for context.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Project ID to scan.  If omitted, scans all projects that have reference stubs in the vault.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Search pattern (regex for grep, glob for find)

path.title: Path
path.description: Directory to search in (absolute or relative to workspaces root)

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Search mode: 'grep' for content, 'find' for filenames

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Project ID whose workspace to enumerate. Falls back to the active project if omitted.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: Workspace name or ID (default: first workspace)

count.title: Count
count.description: Total number of files to select (default 5).

weights.title: Weights
weights.description: Optional weighted distribution across categories. Defaults to the codebase-inspector spec: {source: 0.40, specs: 0.20, tests: 0.15, config: 0.10, recent: 0.15}. Values are normalized.

recent_days.title: Recent Days
recent_days.description: Files modified within this many days are eligible for the 'recent' category (default 7).

history_lookback_days.title: History Lookback Days
history_lookback_days.description: Exclude files that were inspected within this window, based on project-memory inspection records (default 21). Set to 0 to disable.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Optional RNG seed for deterministic selection (useful for tests and reproducible runs).

channel_name.title: Channel Name
channel_name.description: Discord channel name to look up

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Branch name to use as the new default (e.g. dev, main, master)

exclusive.title: Exclusive
exclusive.description: If true, only one agent may work on the project at a time (overrides max_concurrent_agents to 1).

max_agents_by_type.title: Max Agents By Type
max_agents_by_type.description: Per-agent-type concurrency limits, e.g. {"claude": 2, "codex": 1}. Agent types not listed are unrestricted.

pause_scheduling.title: Pause Scheduling
pause_scheduling.description: If true, the scheduler skips this project entirely — no new tasks are assigned until the constraint is released.

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: Identifier of who/what set the constraint (e.g. workflow ID, admin name). Informational only.

status.title: Status
status.description: New status value (e.g. READY, DEFINED, COMPLETED, FAILED, BLOCKED)

format.title: Format
format.description: Output format: 'ascii' for terminal/text output, 'mermaid' for Mermaid flowchart syntax. Default: ascii.

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: Mermaid flowchart direction: 'TD' (top-down) or 'LR' (left-right). Only used with mermaid format. Default: TD.

show_prompts.title: Show Prompts
show_prompts.description: Include truncated prompt previews in node labels. Default: true.

task_id.title: Task Id
task_id.description: Task ID to show dependencies for

TaskRef.title: TaskRef
TaskRef.description: Minimal task reference used in dependency lists, unblocked lists, etc.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why the update/restart is being requested

wait_for_tasks.title: Wait For Tasks
wait_for_tasks.description: If true, pause orchestrator and wait for running tasks to complete before restarting (up to 5 minutes). Default: false.

markdown.title: Markdown
markdown.description: Full markdown content including YAML frontmatter.

expected_source_hash.title: Expected Source Hash
expected_source_hash.description: Content hash the caller last saw (from get_playbook_source). When provided, the update is rejected with a conflict error if the vault copy has changed underneath.

path.title: Path
path.description: File path (absolute or relative to workspaces root)

content.title: Content
content.description: Content to write to the file
